chapters.name: Pre-War Housekeeping
chapters.summary: Before the war, the house. Three pre-dawn cleanups across sibling repos to clear launch-pad cruft.
chapters.content:
## What happened

1. **SproutLab cruft purge** (PR #2 on sproutlab): removed `split/sproutlab.html` (61,948-line duplicate of the compiled entry point, same SHA as `/index.html`) and `split/.trashed-1778272350-intelligence.js` (15,278-line OS-trashed prior version). Together these had inflated Lyra's War Time brief by 77,226 lines (~2×). Real SproutLab split-module surface: ~61,933 lines, not 139,171.

2. **SEP Dashboard v2.1 baseline verification** (PR #1 merged pre-dawn): Nyx + Sovereign restored `index.html` from the 50,279-line bloat back to the 4,531-line v2.1 build. War-time Phase 1 (Pragmatic Patch) effectively completed before Hour 0.

3. **Codex PR #19 disposition**: the formal War Time declaration PR was found to be doc-only (all content already on `main` via commits `8f843d9`, `2e271a1`, `d522295`). Closed without merge; commented with the ratifying-commits pointer.

## Why it mattered

The two compiled-artifact-in-tree cases (SproutLab + SEP Dashboard) are sibling patterns of the same bug class — see Cautionary Tale `lore-compiled-artifacts-in-tree`. Cleaning both before dawn gave all three province Builders a truthful starting line.

chapters.name: Charter + Stack Selection
chapters.summary: Four decisions ratified before a single file of code was written. Edict VIII honored mechanically.
chapters.content:
## Decisions ratified (Sovereign, 2026-04-23)

1. **Temple is permanent, not one-shot** — the War Time dashboard is its first campaign, not its only one. The Temple outlasts any war.
2. **Live fetch from Codex JSON** — Codex is territory, Temple is map. Temple subscribes via `raw.githubusercontent.com`; no local cache of source-of-truth.
3. **Stack B: SvelteKit** — chosen over Stack A (Astro + Svelte islands), Stack C (React SPA), and Stack D (Vite + Svelte without SvelteKit). See Schism entries.
4. **GitHub Pages hosting** — at `https://rishabh1804.github.io/TempleOfMars/`.

## Why Stack B specifically

Astro + Svelte islands would technically ship less JS, but it imposes two mental models on a novice Builder. SvelteKit alone is one mental model end-to-end. The tell that flipped the pick: SproutLab migration scenario. SproutLab is app-shaped; Astro's islands fight that. SvelteKit fits both Temple (content-ish) and a future SproutLab rewrite (app-shaped). Learning cost dominates performance cost at this stage.

## Charter before build

README + CHARTER.md + SCHEMA.md drafted before any Svelte component code. Edict VIII honored.

chapters.name: Metrics + Capture Mechanism
chapters.summary: Priority 1 + 2 metrics locked. Capture via extension to existing snippet-import pipeline.
chapters.content:
## Metrics

**Priority 1:** Sessions per task/phase, tokens in+out, model, estimated USD cost (tokens × rate).
**Priority 2:** Wall-clock duration, commits, LOC delta, efficiency ratio (out/in).
**Priority 3 (deferred):** QA bounces, blockers, scope drift. Captured opportunistically via `log_blocker` op.

## Capture

Codex already has a snippet-import pipeline. Extended with a new `session_log` snippet type — three ops: `record_session`, `update_task_status`, `log_blocker`. Zero new infrastructure. Edict III by construction: Temple has no write credentials.

chapters.name: v0.1 Scaffold + Deploy Pipeline
chapters.summary: 41 files, 9 commits, three hotfix PRs on the deploy pipeline. Green at 23s.
chapters.content:
## What shipped

SvelteKit 2 + adapter-static + Svelte 5 runes (TypeScript strict), Tailwind v4 via @tailwindcss/vite, @vite-pwa/sveltekit (Workbox) honoring Canon 0034, SW runtime-cache for Codex raw JSON, campaign store + Codex fetchers with null-tolerant error handling, phase/campaign aggregation with USD derivation, dashboard components (Countdown, ProvinceCard, Timeline, Checkpoint, LoreSchema, CampaignSummary), design system port (Playfair + Work Sans, theme, fs-base slider, 17-glyph Icon registry), GH Actions → Pages deploy.

## Deploy fire-drill

Four failed runs before the first green. Three hotfix PRs:

1. **#2 (casing):** path base was `/templeofmars/` but GH Pages serves `/TempleOfMars/`. Assets 404'd silently.
2. **#3 (pnpm/action-setup + vite-plugin-svelte):** `version: 9` input conflicted with `packageManager` field. v4 action rejects that combo. Also: vite-plugin-svelte@^5 needs Vite 6; downgraded to ^4.
3. **#4 (setup-node cache):** `cache: pnpm` needs a lockfile to hash. We ship without one. Dropped the cache input.

Final run green at 23s.

## Streaming pattern

Initial monolithic push_files hit stream idle timeouts. Broke into 4–6 smaller batches. See Doctrine `doctrine-stream-commits-not-monoliths`.

chapters.name: Codex Integration — campaigns.json + Session v2
chapters.summary: campaigns.json declared as Temple's source; Session schema extended with optional campaign/telemetry fields.
chapters.content:
## Landed on Codex main (#20)

- `data/campaigns.json` — War Time 2026-04-24 with 8 phases across 3 provinces, 17 tasks, leads + acceptance per phase. Authoritative source; Temple reads live.
- `docs/schema/SESSION_V2.md` — draft extension to Session schema. All new fields optional (campaign_id, phase_id, task_id, builder, province, started_at, ended_at, model, tokens_in, tokens_out, commits[], loc_delta, lore_generated[]). Existing sessions render unchanged.
- `session_log` snippet type declared with three operations.

## Edict III by construction

Temple ships no credentials. The only path for session telemetry is Codex snippet-import → journal.json → raw.githubusercontent.com → Temple's SW cache. No bypass possible.

chapters.name: War Time 2026-04-24 — First Campaign
chapters.summary: The first campaign rendered by Temple of Mars. 72-hour intervention across SproutLab, SEP Dashboard, SEP Invoicing.
chapters.content:
Trigger: Book VI Article 2(c)+(d) — Scope Pivot + Velocity Event.

Start: 2026-04-24 08:00 IST. End: 2026-04-27 08:00 IST.

Provinces + leads:
- SproutLab — Lyra — 3 phases
- SEP Dashboard — Nyx + Sovereign — 3 phases
- SEP Invoicing — Theron + Solara — 2 phases

QA: Cipher. Recorder: Aurelius.

Live at https://rishabh1804.github.io/TempleOfMars/. Chapter advances to `review` at Hour 72, `complete` after Working Committee post-war review.

chapters.name: Canon Entry: Ignis Builder Reassignment
chapters.summary: Canon-inst-* entry formalizing Ignis's vacation of Minister seat and assumption of Temple Builder seat.
chapters.content:
Sovereign decree 2026-04-23 reassigns Ignis from Cabinet Minister seat to Builder of Temple of Mars. First project.

Precedent: canon-inst-001 (Aurelius → Orinth), canon-inst-002 (Rune → Priest). Likely canon-inst-003.

Content to ratify: which Minister seat was vacated, pro-tempore distributive care, Cluster assignment, Builder authority scope. Queued for Sovereign hand.

chapters.name: Codex Import Pipeline — session_log Handler
chapters.content:
## Exists

SESSION_V2.md documents the three ops + data shapes. campaigns.json exists for update_task_status. journal.json accepts the new optional fields.

## Missing

Handler code in the snippet-import dispatcher. Dedup by session id; update_task_status traverses phases until it finds the task.

## Acceptance

First War Time session logs via snippet paste. Temple dashboard shows non-zero aggregates after refresh.

chapters.name: PNG Icon Set (192 / 512)
chapters.summary: v0.1 ships with a single SVG icon. iOS Safari prefers PNG.
chapters.content:
Current: static/icon.svg + static/favicon.svg. Manifest declares SVG for both 192 and 512. Chromium accepts; iOS Safari prefers PNG.

Action: rasterize icon.svg at 192×192 and 512×512, commit, update manifest. Queue for v0.2.

chapters.name: v0.2 — Lore Browser
chapters.summary: mdsvex-backed content collections over Chronicles, Doctrines, Cautionary Tales.
chapters.content: Reads canons.json lore[] and/or embeds markdown in src/content/. Searchable, filterable by category/domain/tag. References resolvable. Fits Pillar III.

chapters.name: v0.2 — Province Detail Views
chapters.content: SvelteKit dynamic routes. Reads volumes.json for project metadata, filters journal.json sessions by province. Extends ProvinceCard into a full surface.

chapters.name: Working Committee — Watchtower Class Designation
chapters.summary: Formal ratification of Watchtower as sibling-class to Monument under Edict VI.
chapters.content: CHARTER proposes Watchtower as a new structural class. Command Center directs; Temple observes. Working Committee to ratify post-war. Alternative (rejected in schism-temple-as-another-monument): strip Watchtower language.
